list.name: district
list.label: Район
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT district FROM iceberg.gold.mart_price_area_by_district ORDER BY district
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT district FROM iceberg.gold.mart_price_area_by_district ORDER BY district

panels.title: Цены и площади по районам (atemporal; фильтр district)

targets.rawSQL: SELECT district, listing_count, avg_price_rub, median_price_rub, min_price_rub, max_price_rub, avg_price_per_m2, avg_area_m2 FROM iceberg.gold.mart_price_area_by_district WHERE district IN (${district:singlequote}) ORDER BY listing_count DESC

panels.title: Срезы стиль / ремонт / мебель (atemporal; is_small_sample виден)

targets.rawSQL: SELECT style_norm, renovation_style_norm, has_renovation, has_furniture, listing_count, avg_price_rub, median_price_rub, avg_area_m2, is_small_sample FROM iceberg.gold.mart_style_renovation_furniture ORDER BY listing_count DESC, style_norm

panels.title: Динамика загрузок по дням (time-picker по load_date)

targets.rawSQL: SELECT CAST(load_date AS TIMESTAMP) AS time, listings_added, listings_added_cumulative FROM iceberg.gold.mart_listing_dynamics WHERE load_date BETWEEN CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AND CAST($__timeTo() AS DATE) ORDER BY load_date
